project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:

    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 650

    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
---

function.message: Completed. I processed the next inbound note and ran the four requested finance documents through the OCR workflow by adding schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to each file while preserving the original body text verbatim. Then I removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system before task work, used process-next-inbox-item + OCR + finance schema guidance, preserved original record bodies during frontmatter migration, and deleted the inbox file after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly named four finance records for OCR. Each target file was read, then updated with required invoice/bill frontmatter fields and ordered line items derived from visible note content, with original body retained below frontmatter per schema/workflow requirements. After all four edits succeeded, the inbox item was deleted as directed by inbox-processing-v2.
